# The Day Rave

> A five-hour daytime wellness event in Amsterdam combining a DJ-led coffee rave with cold plunge, sauna, HIIT, Pilates, Zumba, and Booty & Core classes. Sunday 14 June 2026, 12:00–17:00 at IJland, Amsterdam Noord.

## Event Details

- **Name:** The Day Rave — Cold Plunge & Coffee Rave
- **Date:** Sunday, 14 June 2026
- **Time:** 12:00 – 17:00 (CEST)
- **Venue:** IJland, Tt. Vasumweg 171, 1033 SG Amsterdam, Netherlands
- **Coordinates:** 52.3878° N, 4.9174° E
- **Capacity:** 400 spots
- **Age:** 18+ only
- **Format:** Open-day urban wellness event
- **Organiser:** House Decoded Events
- **Website:** https://thedayrave.com
- **Tickets:** https://www.eventbrite.nl/e/tickets-the-coffee-day-rave-wellness-event-1988484526748

## Ticket Tiers (prices include service fees)

1. **Only Rave — €12.21** — Access to coffee rave and main stage DJ set
2. **Studio Classes + Rave — €20.07** — Coffee rave + studio classes (Pilates, Booty & Core)
3. **Sauna + Cold Plunges + Rave — €22.17** — Coffee rave + guided sauna and cold plunge sessions
4. **All Access Pass — €27.41** — Full access to coffee rave, all classes, sauna, and cold plunge

## What Happens

The Day Rave is structured as four parallel "areas" running across five hours:

- **Main Stage** — Coffee Rave + Zumba (with Melisa) + HIIT (with Simone)
- **The Garden** — Contrast Therapy: Cold Plunge (3°C, guided, trainer-led) + Sauna (90°C)
- **Water Terrace** — Food, drink and health & wellness brand stalls
- **The Studio** — Pilates and Booty & Core classes (mats provided)

A DJ-led day soundtrack plays continuously across five hours — the "coffee rave". No alcohol; the energy comes from specialty coffee, cold-pressed juice, contrast therapy and movement.

## Key Facts

- No alcohol served — coffee + cold-pressed juice
- All cold plunge and sauna sessions are trainer-led
- Bring your own towel and swimwear; mats provided for studio classes
- Both indoor (main stage, studio) and outdoor (garden, water terrace) zones
- Parking is free at the venue
- Refunds available up to 7 days before the event (until 7 June 2026)
- Emergency medical assistance on site for the full duration
